text.message: I leave you 9411 and you leave me 1092?
And both of our setups are worse
can I get a wheat trade
Will need the 6 to roll but yeah
Or can give ore for brick off placements if you want
It’s worse for both of us by a lot
Figured you’d want wood port first with 9411 always open for you
As opposed to fighting two worse spots
Yeah so if you do other deal you get wood port and 9411
Now you have chance to lose both
But it’s okay we will just trade a lot <3
Franny boy what are we doing here
We gave free card for insurance to the leader without the road settle in hand?
What do you need to settle
Basically I trade you my only wheat for wood if you never plow 62
Just leave me the 62 and let me hit the 6 ore brother
You’ve got two settles to get down
It give no action just to hold for your city
after I settle Ill be able to trade
And hold for me to do something eventually
its useless in my hand rn
Even if my table chat seems rude I never actually care
I won't join the next francesco lobby
bro I said I ws sorry
Unfortunately I assure you, we’re still getting cooked
I can give 4 ore for two cards
No we need to take road here
so it doesn't matter If I connect or not
I assure you I’m not in a good spot either even with these 6 devs
and I play one of the worst games of my life
I honestly don't think I've seen a single worst performance
just messing up again and again
Idk what's going on its sparrow
It’s okay it’s okay no worries
all u see is that Im playing bad
well you ruined the game from the start
and then you trade with the leader time and time again
You can maybe get 8410 into road
City a bit quick seems possible
I get why you say it isn’t
I just mean I flip army here we have time again
How can I help a man like you
Unfortunately I just rolled 4 of this card
So a 5th is not that enticing
If you’re worried about trading me
When I said I had 0 VPs I was telling the truth
I just tripped popped 3 VP after
I forgot I had to do a trade back
